indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: Couch is too large and too soft for comfortable sleep, and its position obstructs access to other areas.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, which can be disruptive to sleep patterns.

indicators.name: hard wood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring can be noisy and uncomfortable to sleep on.

indicators.name: high ceilings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can make the space feel cold and less cozy, which can affect sleep quality.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for primary sleep. The presence of a couch and large windows makes it unsuitable for sleep, while the hard wood flooring and high ceilings contribute to discomfort and potential noise. The lack of a dedicated sleep area or furniture specifically designed for sleep further reduces the suitability.
